description.en: Exception raised when non-blocking put() (or put_nowait()) is called on a Queue object which is full.

excerpt.es: Exception raised when non-blocking put() (or put_nowait()) is called on a Queue object which is full.
excerpt.en: Exception raised when non-blocking put() (or put_nowait()) is called on a Queue object which is full.

description.en: Return True if the queue is full, False otherwise. If full() returns True it doesn’t guarantee that a subsequent call to get() will not block. Similarly, if full() returns False it doesn’t guarantee that a subsequent call to put() will not block.
